main.name: Nirmal Ragavan
main.description: 5+ years building scalable enterprise systems, microservices, and AI-powered applications.
main.bio: I'm Nirmal Ragavan, a Senior Software Engineer with 5 years and 5 months of hands-on experience designing and delivering enterprise-grade full-stack solutions. I specialize in Java, Spring Boot, React, Node.js, and cloud-native microservices. I have led large-scale system migrations, architected high-performance RESTful APIs, and driven production stability across distributed systems. Passionate about AI-driven developer tooling and open-source contributions.
main.contactmessage: Get in touch with me to discuss projects, collaborations, or opportunities.

resume.skillmessage: Core technologies and tools I work with across backend, frontend, databases, and DevOps.

education.description: Completed with a cumulative GPA of 7.1

education.degree: Bachelor Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering
education.description: Completed with a cumulative GPA of 7.14

work.title: Senior Software Engineer
work.description: Architected and delivered enterprise-grade full-stack features across Java Spring Boot microservices and React frontends. Led migration of 16 legacy services to Java 11, reducing technical debt and improving system reliability. Designed RESTful APIs with Spring Security, optimized Hibernate query performance, and drove production debugging for high-traffic systems. Collaborated cross-functionally with product, QA, and infrastructure teams to ship scalable, maintainable solutions.

work.title: Software Engineer
work.description: Developed and maintained client-driven enhancements using JSP, SQL, and Hibernate across a distributed reward and recognition platform. Built responsive React.js UIs and Express.js APIs integrated with Java Spring Boot services. Contributed to performance tuning initiatives that reduced API response times by 40%. Participated in architecture reviews and drove adoption of CI/CD best practices.

work.title: Software Engineer
work.description: Designed and implemented business process workflows using IBM BPM/BAW (v8.5, v8.6). Built RESTful APIs and UI Coaches with Java 8, Spring Boot, and Microservices architecture. Integrated MySQL and Oracle databases with Spring Security for secure, role-based access. Delivered automated process solutions that reduced manual intervention across enterprise workflows.

work.title: Full Stack Engineer
work.description: Delivered 20+ freelance projects including e-commerce platforms, REST APIs, and mobile applications using React, React Native, Node.js, and MongoDB. Maintained 5-star ratings on Fiverr and Upwork through consistent on-time delivery and high-quality code.

package.title: react-native-img-placeholder
package.description: A React Native image component that displays a placeholder while the network image is loading, with support for custom placeholder sources.

package.title: react-native-text-thumbnail
package.description: Generates a text-based avatar thumbnail (2-character initials) for use when a user profile image is unavailable.

package.title: loadlazy
package.description: A lightweight lazy-load image library for React.js that enables performant image galleries with deferred loading.

projects.title: Bus Ticket Management System
projects.description: End-to-end bus ticketing platform with seat selection, booking management, and admin dashboard. Built with AngularJS frontend and Java Spring Boot REST APIs backed by MySQL.

projects.title: Gender Bias in STEM – Data Visualization
projects.description: Interactive Tableau dashboard analyzing gender representation trends across science and technology fields using public census datasets. Highlights key disparities across regions and time periods.

projects.title: Education Trends in Tamil Nadu
projects.description: Power BI report analyzing school enrollment, dropout rates, and infrastructure metrics across Tamil Nadu districts. Surfaces actionable insights for policy decision-making.

projects.title: Advanced Excel Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Complex Excel workbook integrating database connections, pivot tables, conditional logic, and dynamic charts for enterprise-level financial and operational reporting.

aiProjects.title: DevIntellect – AI Engineering Intelligence Platform
aiProjects.description: AI-powered platform that analyzes Git repositories to help developers detect root causes, visualize code impact, and understand technical dependencies. Integrates with GitHub API to surface commit-level intelligence and developer productivity insights.

aiProjects.title: AI Log Root Cause Analyzer
aiProjects.description: Intelligent log analysis tool that ingests system logs and leverages AI to identify recurring error patterns, pinpoint root causes, and recommend automated fixes. Reduces mean time to resolution (MTTR) for production incidents.

aiProjects.title: AI Code Impact Analyzer
aiProjects.description: Analyzes Git commits and statically maps downstream impact across microservices using AI-assisted dependency graph traversal. Generates automated impact reports to reduce risk during deployments.

testimonials.text: Nirmal did an amazing job and delivered much faster than expected! He understood the requirements immediately and started work right away. I would definitely hire him again for any programming job.
Great developer to work with. Very professional and time-sensitive. I will keep working with him long-term!
Nirmal successfully delivered an online store using React, MongoDB, and Node.js. He listened to every update request and applied changes quickly. I would definitely recommend him.
Great job. Solid React Native skills and excellent communication throughout the project.
